name: statistical-analysis
tagline: Guides statistical test selection, assumption checks, effect sizes, power analysis, and APA-style reporting via pingouin/statsmodels/PyMC.
verdict: Well-structured, accurate guided-analysis skill: clear triggers, verified library compatibility notes, concrete decision tables, worked APA report templates, and reference files that all resolve. Minor gap: a couple of method choices (outlier detection, multiple-comparison correction) lack a stated default.

highlights.summary: Correction choice left open: 'Holm or Benjamini-Hochberg FDR for other families' with no criterion for which to pick.
